description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:git image with a docker:dind service. Define two stages (build and release) and set variables CONTAINER_BUILD_IMAGE and CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE pointing to registry.gitlab.com/rilis/docker-ci with appropriate tags. Add a build job that runs in the build stage, inherits a before_script that logs in to the registry (docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com), then executes docker build --no-cache=true -t $CONTAINER_BUILD_IMAGE . and docker images, and is excluded from the master branch. Add a release job that runs in the release stage, only on the master branch, runs docker build --no-cache=true -t $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE . , docker images, and docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE. No caches or artifacts are defined.
